## Summary

What changed, and which user or contributor workflow does it affect?

## Owner Boundary

Name the owner of the changed state or behavior:

- [ ] main process / durable state
- [ ] preload IPC contract
- [ ] renderer UI projection or local UI state
- [ ] agent runtime / checkpoint / approval path
- [ ] extension SDK or installable extension package
- [ ] documentation, release, or repository operations

If this crosses a boundary, describe the dependency direction and failure
semantics.

## Related Issue

Fixes #

## Checks

- [ ] I ran the smallest relevant local check.
- [ ] I listed any skipped checks and why.
- [ ] UI changes include screenshots or a short visual QA note.
- [ ] Dependency changes include the relevant package audit when needed.
- [ ] I understand that intentional contributions are submitted under the Apache License 2.0 unless explicitly stated otherwise.

## Notes

Anything reviewers should know before reading the diff.
